([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Кіровський район) is an urban district of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), named after a mayor of the Russian city [Saint Petersburg](/wiki/Saint_Petersburg "Saint Petersburg") [Sergei Kirov](/wiki/Sergei_Kirov "Sergei Kirov").

Districts of Donetsk on the territory of the Donetsk City Municipality:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Budonivskyi District  Voroshylovskyi District  Kalininskyi District  Kyivskyi District  Kirovskyi District | Kuibyshevskyi District  Leninskyi District  Petrovskyi District  Proletarskyi District |

**Kirovskyi District** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Кіровський район) is an urban district of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), named after a mayor of the Russian city [Saint Petersburg](/wiki/Saint_Petersburg "Saint Petersburg") [Sergei Kirov](/wiki/Sergei_Kirov "Sergei Kirov").
